game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Traffic Jam by ABI GLOBAL LTD.: This is a classic sliding block puzzle game where players must maneuver a designated "bus" block out of a grid filled with other stationary or movable vehicle blocks. Each vehicle block can only slide horizontally or vertically along its orientation, and players must strategically move obstructing vehicles to clear a path for the bus to exit.
game_info.description: Navigate the red bus through a congested parking lot by sliding vehicles out of the way. Each vehicle can only move along its orientation (horizontal or vertical). Clear a path to the exit on the right side of the grid. Progress through increasingly challenging puzzles with more vehicles and tighter spaces. Can you master all levels?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move between vehicles to select them
Space: Grab/Release selected vehicle
Arrow Keys (while holding): Slide the grabbed vehicle in valid direction
R: Restart to main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
Enter: Start game from main menu
